description: This is a screenshot of a Windows file explorer window displaying a metadata file for Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) Imperviousness Density (IMD) data. The breadcrumb navigation path at the top shows the file's location as `Imperviousness_Layers > 2018 > IMD_2018_010m > metadata`. A search for `"metadata"` is active in the top right. The main file list shows one entry: `IMD_2018_010m_eu_03035_V2_0`. Its last modified date is `10.07.2020 14:27`, the file type is `XML-Datei` (XML File), and the size is `43 KB`. At the bottom, a filename field is pre-populated with `IMD_2018_010m_eu_03035_V2_0`, next to buttons labelled `Alle Dateien` (All Files) and `Öffnen` (Open).
